CreateReservedInstances.reservedInstanceName: Reserved instance name. Rules: supports uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and special characters -_ /.; must start with a Chinese character or letter; length 1–65; duplicates allowed. Auto-named as reservedInstance-${random} if not specified, following the same rules.
CreateReservedInstances.scope: Availability scope of the reserved instance; default: AZ
CreateReservedInstances.offeringType: Default payment type is fully prepaid: FullyPrepay
CreateReservedInstances.instanceCount: Number of instances; default is 1; cannot be changed
CreateReservedInstances.reservedInstanceCount: Number of reserved instances; default is 1; cannot exceed quota (default quota: 20); contact support ticket to request more
CreateReservedInstances.reservedInstanceTime: Purchase duration for reserved instances; supports 3, 6, 9, 12, 24, 36 months
CreateReservedInstances.reservedInstanceTimeUnit: Unit for purchase duration; default is month; cannot be changed
CreateReservedInstances.autoRenewTimeUnit: Unit for auto-renewal duration; default is month; cannot be changed
CreateReservedInstances.autoRenewTime: Auto-renewal duration; supports 3, 6, 9, 12, 24, 36 months; required when autoRenew is true and must match reservedInstanceTime
CreateReservedInstances.effectiveTime: Effective time; default is immediate; custom effective time cannot exceed 1 day and must be set at 15-minute intervals (e.g. 10:00, 10:15, 10:30, 10:45, 11:00)
CreateReservedInstances.tags: Tag information (returned when querying reserved instances)
CreateReservedInstances.ehcClusterId: Optional parameter when creating a RoCE reserved instance; uses the default EHC cluster if left empty
